eval_dimensions.name: Branch Naming Convention
eval_dimensions.description: Produces branch name matching username/TICKET-ID/[worktree-name/]slug pattern from SKILL.md §Step 5

eval_dimensions.name: Worktree Detection
eval_dimensions.description: Detects whether CWD is a worktree (primary: .worktrees/ path; fallback: .git is a file) and includes worktree-name segment when true

eval_dimensions.name: Uncommitted Changes Gate
eval_dimensions.description: Warns user and gates on uncommitted changes before creating a branch

eval_dimensions.name: Develop Sync
eval_dimensions.description: Fetches and pulls latest develop before creating the branch; branches from origin/develop in worktree context where develop is checked out elsewhere

eval_dimensions.name: Branch Collision Handling
eval_dimensions.description: Detects when the target branch already exists and offers checkout rather than failing silently

eval_dimensions.name: Task Tracking
eval_dimensions.description: Creates a task at invocation and marks it completed when the branch is confirmed

evals.name: Create branch in regular repo (no worktree)
evals.description: Clean working directory, main repo. Tests full 7-step happy path producing username/TICKET-ID/slug.

assertions.signal: TaskCreate called at invocation with subject containing 'branch'
git fetch origin develop called before branch creation
Branch name does NOT contain a worktree segment — .git is a directory (main repo)
Final branch name contains ticket ID PAY-133
Slug extracted from title: 'fix-motor-timeout' (removes stopwords, lowercases, hyphenates)
TaskUpdate called with status=completed after branch confirmed

evals.name: Create branch inside a worktree
evals.description: CWD is /work/example/.worktrees/app-pos-7. Tests that worktree-name segment is inserted between TICKET-ID and slug.

setup.note: CWD contains .worktrees/ — primary CWD-based detection should fire

assertions.signal: Skill identifies CWD as a worktree via .worktrees/ path segment
Worktree name 'app-pos-7' extracted from CWD path
Uses 'git checkout -b <branch> origin/develop' since develop is checked out in main worktree

evals.name: Gate on uncommitted changes
evals.description: Working directory has uncommitted files. Skill must warn and use AskUserQuestion before proceeding.
evals.input: /Dev10x:ticket-branch ENG-42 "Add retry mechanism for Square API"

assertions.signal: Skill warns user with a message containing 'uncommitted' (Step 1: plain-text warning per SKILL.md)
Skill asks whether to continue before proceeding — plain-text question surfaced to user
git checkout -b is NOT called before the user explicitly confirms they want to continue

evals.name: Branch collision — offer checkout instead of failing
evals.description: Target branch already exists. Skill detects and offers to check it out.

assertions.signal: Skill informs user that the target branch already exists (Step 6 plain-text notification per SKILL.md)
Skill offers to check out the existing branch rather than failing silently — plain-text question to user
git checkout -b (new branch creation) is NOT called when the branch already exists

evals.name: Slug generation removes stopwords and truncates
evals.description: Verifies slug rules: lowercase, hyphens, strip stopwords (a/the/in/for/with/of/to/and), max 3-4 words.
evals.input: /Dev10x:ticket-branch ENG-99 "Refactor the invoice generation service for performance"

assertions.signal: Stopwords 'the' and 'for' removed; slug is 'refactor-invoice-generation' (3 words)
Slug has at most 4 hyphen-separated segments
Slug contains only lowercase letters and hyphens — no uppercase or special characters

should_trigger.query: Create a branch for PAY-133: Fix MotorTimeoutException in payment processing
should_trigger.rationale: Explicit ticket ID + title — primary use case
Direct invocation with ticket ID and title

should_trigger.query: I need a feature branch for ENG-99 — the invoice refactor ticket
should_trigger.rationale: Natural-language request with ticket ID and implicit title

should_not_trigger.query: Create a new worktree for DEV-55
should_not_trigger.rationale: Worktree creation belongs to Dev10x:git-worktree, which creates the branch internally

should_not_trigger.query: commit these changes to the current branch

should_not_trigger.rationale: Checking out an already-existing branch — no creation needed
